# JK Prestige Constructor Corp

> Jacksonville FL's #1 family-operated general contractor since 2017 — delivering ground-up construction, custom homes, hospitals, warehouses, commercial builds, full renovations, and residential & commercial roofing across Northeast Florida and the Southeast US. 500+ projects. OSHA 30. GAF Master Elite. Licensed & bonded. Free 48-hour estimate at (904) 944-0278.

## Company

- [About JK Prestige Constructor Corp](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/): Founded 2017, Jacksonville FL. Family-operated. 500+ projects delivered across hospitals, custom homes, warehouses, commercial, and roofing.
- [The JK Way](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/#/the-jk-way): Our operating philosophy — lean scheduling, VDC/BIM technology, OSHA 30 safety culture, and owner-direct communication on every project.
- [Contact & Free Estimate](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/#/contact): Get a free written estimate within 48 hours. Call (904) 944-0278 or email jerekaine@hotmail.com.
- [Project Portfolio](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/#/projects): Completed projects across hospitals, custom homes, warehouses, commercial, and renovations.

## Core Services

- [General Contractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/general-contractor-jacksonville-fl/): Full-service licensed general contractor serving Jacksonville and Northeast Florida since 2017.
- [Expertise Overview](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/#/expertise): All construction verticals — hospitals, custom homes, warehouses, commercial, renovations.
- [Hospital & Medical Construction](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/expertise/hospitals): ICRA-compliant healthcare construction, NFPA 99, occupied facility phasing.
- [Custom Home Builder Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/custom-home-builder-jacksonville-fl/): Design-build custom homes on your lot throughout Duval, St. Johns, and Clay counties.
- [Warehouse Construction Florida](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/warehouse-construction-florida/): Tilt-up, steel-frame, and precast industrial facilities from 10,000 to 480,000+ sq ft.
- [Commercial Construction Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/commercial-construction-jacksonville-fl/): Retail, office, restaurant, medical office, and mixed-use commercial builds.
- [Home Renovation Contractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/home-renovation-contractor-jacksonville-fl/): Full home renovations, kitchen & bath remodels, additions, and gut renovations.

## Roofing Division

- [Roofing Contractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/roofing-contractor-jacksonville-fl/): Residential and commercial roofing — new roofs, replacements, repairs, and storm damage. GAF Master Elite certified.
- [Roofing Division](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/#/roofing): Free roof inspections, storm damage response, and full roofing system replacement.
- [Roof Replacement Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/roof-replacement-jacksonville-fl/): Full tear-off and replacement with GAF Golden Pledge warranty available.
- [Storm Damage Roof Repair Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/storm-damage-roof-repair-jacksonville-fl/): 24/7 emergency response, insurance claim documentation, adjuster coordination.
- [Commercial Roofing Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/commercial-roofing-jacksonville-fl/): TPO, EPDM, modified bitumen flat roofing for commercial and industrial properties.
- [Free Roof Inspection Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/roof-inspection-jacksonville-fl/): Free 24-point roof inspection with written report. No obligation.

## Homeowner Services

- [Home Addition Contractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/home-addition-contractor-jacksonville-fl/): Room additions, second-story additions, in-law suites, garage additions.
- [Kitchen Remodel Contractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/kitchen-remodel-contractor-jacksonville-fl/): Full kitchen renovations with permits, design coordination, and trade management.
- [Bathroom Remodel Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/bathroom-remodel-jacksonville-fl/): Complete bath renovations including waterproofing, tile, plumbing, and finishes.
- [Whole Home Renovation Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/whole-home-renovation-jacksonville-fl/): Gut-to-studs whole house renovations managed as a single contract.
- [ADU Builder Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/adu-builder-jacksonville-fl/): Accessory dwelling units, in-law suites, and detached guest homes.
- [Hurricane Resistant Home Builder Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/hurricane-resistant-home-builder-jacksonville-fl/): Florida Building Code wind-resistant construction, impact glazing, roof-to-wall connections.
- [Luxury Home Builder Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/luxury-home-builder-jacksonville-fl/): High-end custom home construction with premium finishes and smart home integration.
- [Home Renovation Cost Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/home-renovation-cost-jacksonville-fl/): Realistic cost ranges for renovations in Jacksonville — kitchens, baths, additions, whole-home.

## Commercial & B2B Services

- [Commercial General Contractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/commercial-general-contractor-jacksonville-fl/): Full commercial construction delivery — office, retail, medical, industrial.
- [Hospital Construction Florida](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/hospital-construction-florida/): Licensed Florida GC for hospital and medical facility construction. ICRA, NFPA 99, FGI Guidelines.
- [Design-Build Contractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/design-build-contractor-jacksonville-fl/): Single-source design and construction delivery for faster schedules and lower risk.
- [Preconstruction Services Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/preconstruction-services-jacksonville-fl/): Estimating, budgeting, scheduling, and value engineering before you break ground.
- [Tilt-Up Construction Florida](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/tilt-up-construction-florida/): Tilt-up concrete panel warehouse and industrial construction across Florida.
- [Subcontractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/subcontractor-jacksonville-fl/): GC-to-GC subcontracting — framing, drywall, roofing self-perform for other general contractors.
- [Multifamily Construction Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/multifamily-construction-jacksonville-fl/): Apartment complexes, podium buildings, townhome communities, and mixed-use residential.
- [LEED Construction Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/leed-construction-jacksonville-fl/): LEED-certified construction documentation, sustainable building practices.
- [Value Engineering Contractor Jacksonville FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/value-engineering-contractor-jacksonville-fl/): Preconstruction cost reduction, BIM clash detection, constructability reviews.

## Service Areas

- [General Contractor Ponte Vedra FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/general-contractor-ponte-vedra-fl/): Serving Ponte Vedra Beach, TPC, and St. Johns County communities.
- [General Contractor Orange Park FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/general-contractor-orange-park-fl/): Clay County construction — Orange Park, Fleming Island, Middleburg.
- [General Contractor Mandarin FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/general-contractor-mandarin-fl/): South Jacksonville/Mandarin area residential and commercial construction.
- [General Contractor Jacksonville Beach FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/general-contractor-jacksonville-beach-fl/): Beaches area construction — Jacksonville Beach, Neptune Beach, Atlantic Beach.
- [Roofing Contractor Ponte Vedra FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/roofing-contractor-ponte-vedra-fl/): Residential and commercial roofing serving Ponte Vedra and St. Johns County.
- [Commercial Contractor St. Augustine FL](https://jkprestigeconstruction.com/commercial-contractor-st-augustine-fl/): Commercial construction in St. Augustine and Flagler County.
